testcase.name: test_lockout_after_5_fails
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration2.py:107: in test_lockout_after_5_fails assert r.status_code == 429, f"Expected lockout 429, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected lockout 429, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid email or password"} E assert 401 == 429 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_newsletter_rate_limit

failure.message: AssertionError: Newsletter rate limit not triggered within 8 requests assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration2.py:121: in test_newsletter_rate_limit assert seen_429, "Newsletter rate limit not triggered within 8 requests" E AssertionError: Newsletter rate limit not triggered within 8 requests E assert False

testcase.name: test_pickup_rate_limit

failure.message: AssertionError: Pickup rate limit not triggered within 12 requests assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration2.py:131: in test_pickup_rate_limit assert seen_429, "Pickup rate limit not triggered within 12 requests" E AssertionError: Pickup rate limit not triggered within 12 requests E assert False
